title: ADD-ONs for Programmer Art Continuation Project!
description: Officially made add-ons for the Programmer Art Continuation Project.
body:
# PACP Add-Ons 

My pack, the [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) used to feature a simple Add-On system, where the files were included within the zip. (Still does ON PMC)

This project compiles those Add-Ons into their own project, so you can install them into Modrinth's Launcher, or just download them here.

These are add-ons made by the project's original creator, myself. Some are big vibe-changers, some are small tweaks. More are coming, overtime.

## Current Add-Ons:

**ALPHA-FIED:** An Add-On Inspired by Alpha Minecraft and it's ongoing modding scene, meant to make the game look like a newer Alpha/Pre-Alpha Mod. Includes an unique biome temperature grass system using Continuity.

Inspired by mods like Infdev+, Reindev, NSSS, and my own BTA: Order of the Stone texture pack.

**BETA-FIED:** An Add-On designed to resemble some of the newer Minecraft Beta mods, meant to make PACP look like a heavily modded Beta 1.7.3.

Inspired by Mods like Better than Adventure and Minecraft Diverge.

**MODERNIZED NETHERRACK:** Netherrack Textures inspired by the modern design. Lower Contrast. Inlcudes Nylium and Nether Gold.

**UNIQUE ORES:** Colorblind Friendly ore block shapes. May be updated eventually.

**1.12.2 WATER:** 1.12.2 Water Textures. Upped saturation to try to circumvent the Vanilla Water colors.

Unlikely to get updated unless a version messes with the file structure for water.
